name: devopsflow
description: DevOpsFlow engineering workflow skills for Codex: routing, DDD, TDD, planning, execution, debugging, review, verification, and branch finishing.

interface.longDescription: DevOpsFlow provides a composable Codex workflow for routing engineering requests, DDD modeling, TDD handoff, implementation planning, execution, debugging, review, verification, and branch finishing.
